memo: CRITICAL COMPLIANCE FAILURE: The expedited decision deadline was breached 21 hours ago. Received 2026-07-06 at 12:00 UTC; expedited deadline was 2026-07-09 at 12:00 UTC (72 hours). Current time is 2026-07-10 at 09:00 UTC. An untimely determination—even an approval—is itself a regulatory failure and cannot be finalized. The notice must not go out. Escalate to medical director and compliance officer immediately. The member has been waiting for a decision while occupying an acute bed; this delay carries both clinical and legal risk. Recommend: (1) halt the notice, (2) coordinate with the facility to hold the bed or arrange emergency placement pending a same-day redetermination, (3) document the breach and root cause, (4) escalate to appeals and compliance for internal review.
member_impact: We are very sorry. Your nursing home approval decision has been delayed beyond the deadline we were supposed to meet. We are immediately escalating this to our leadership team to fix it and get you a fast answer today.
recommended_actions: DO NOT FINALIZE OR SEND THIS NOTICE
Escalate immediately to medical director and compliance
Coordinate with acute care facility regarding bed hold
Redetermine the request same-day under expedited track
Document the breach and corrective action in the member's file
Review triage/processing procedures to identify why the 72-hour clock was missed

findings.detail: File is complete: all 4 required documents for snf_admission are present.
Decision clock BREACHED: the expedited deadline was 2026-07-09T12:00:00Z and it is now 2026-07-10T09:00:00Z. An untimely adverse determination is itself a compliance failure — escalate.

escalate_reason: Decision clock breached: expedited deadline 2026-07-09T12:00:00Z has passed; current time 2026-07-10T09:00:00Z (21 hours overdue). An untimely determination is a compliance failure regardless of approval/denial. The notice cannot be finalized.
